pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project continues to compile and run against Java 17, failing to utilize Java 21 features or enforce Java 21 compatibility.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Micrometer version to align with Spring Boot 3.3 dependencies.
Remove exclusion of JUnit Vintage engine from spring-boot-starter-test.

src/main/java/com/bernardomg/association.general_idea: Replace iterator-based retrieval of the first element with the Java 21 Collection.getFirst() method.
Add the @Serial annotation to the serialVersionUID field to comply with Java 14+ serialization best practices and suppress warnings.
Add the @Serial annotation to the serialVersionUID field to comply with Java 14+ serialization rules.
src/main/java/com/bernardomg/association.why_exists: Compilation error: serialVersionUID must be annotated with @Serial in Java 14+ unless the module is configured to allow legacy serialization.

src/main/java/com/bernardomg/association.general_idea: Import the java.io.Serial class to support the new annotation.
src/main/java/com/bernardomg/association.why_exists: Compilation error: cannot find symbol class Serial.

src/main/java/com/bernardomg/association.general_idea: Add import for the new java.io.Serial annotation introduced in Java 17.
Annotate serialVersionUID with @Serial to explicitly mark it as a serialization field.

src/main/java/com/bernardomg/mvc/springf.general_idea: Migrate instanceof check to use pattern matching to extract the variable directly.
Replace explicit cast with the variable extracted via pattern matching.

src/main/java/com/bernardomg/security/au.general_idea: Replace explicit cast with pattern matching instanceof to leverage Java 16+ language feature.

src/main/java/com/bernardomg/security/co.general_idea: Replace deprecated Spring Security 5 annotation with Spring Security 6 equivalent.
src/main/java/com/bernardomg/security/co.why_exists: The class EnableGlobalMethodSecurity was removed in Spring Security 6; using it causes a compile error (class not found).

src/main/java/com/bernardomg/security/co.general_idea: Update annotation usage to match the new API signature.
src/main/java/com/bernardomg/security/co.why_exists: The annotation EnableGlobalMethodSecurity no longer exists in Spring Security 6, so the code fails to compile.

src/main/java/com/bernardomg/security/co.general_idea: Migrate Spring Security HttpSecurity configuration from the deprecated fluent API (using .and()) to the new lambda-based DSL introduced in Spring Security 5.7+.
src/main/java/com/bernardomg/security/co.why_exists: The .and() method and the old fluent builder style are deprecated in Spring Security 5.7 and removed in Spring Security 6 (required for Spring Boot 3.x), causing compilation errors or runtime failures if not updated.

src/main/java/com/bernardomg/security/co.general_idea: Update the HttpSecurity.apply() call to use the new with() method signature required by Spring Security 6.
src/main/java/com/bernardomg/security/co.why_exists: The apply() method is removed in Spring Security 6; using it causes a compilation error. The new with() method requires a Customizer argument.

src/main/java/com/bernardomg/security/co.general_idea: Migrate exceptionHandling and sessionManagement configuration blocks from the deprecated fluent API to the new lambda-based DSL.
src/main/java/com/bernardomg/security/co.why_exists: The .and() chaining and old builder methods for exceptionHandling and sessionManagement are removed in Spring Security 6, causing compilation errors.

src/main/java/com/bernardomg/security/co.general_idea: Add the necessary static import for Customizer.withDefaults() to support the new Spring Security DSL syntax.
src/main/java/com/bernardomg/security/co.why_exists: The withDefaults() method is used in the new DSL but is not imported, causing a compilation error if the import is missing.

src/test/java/com/bernardomg/association.general_idea: Replace deprecated List.iterator().next() with List.getFirst() for retrieving the first element.
Replace iterator().next() with getFirst() to use the new List API introduced in Java 21.
src/test/java/com/bernardomg/association.why_exists: While iterator().next() still compiles, the migration recipe targets modernizing code to use the new List.getFirst() method available in Java 21 for cleaner syntax.

src/test/java/com/bernardomg/association.general_idea: Replace iterator-based retrieval of the first element with the Stream API's getFirst() method introduced in Java 21.
Replace iterator-based retrieval of the first element with the Stream API's getFirst() method introduced in Java 21.
src/test/java/com/bernardomg/association.why_exists: The code compiles and runs on Java 17, but getFirst() is a new convenience method in Java 21; this is a modernization/polishment change, not a fix for a breaking change.

src/test/java/com/bernardomg/association.general_idea: Replace iterator().next() with getFirst() for retrieving the first element of a list.

src/test/java/com/bernardomg/security/da.why_exists: The method List.getFirst() does not exist in Java 17, causing a compilation error.

src/test/java/com/bernardomg/security/da.general_idea: Replace iterator().next() with getFirst() to use the Java 21 List API.
src/test/java/com/bernardomg/security/da.why_exists: Code fails to compile on JDK 21 if getFirst() is not used and iterator().next() is kept, as the migration recipe enforces the new API; however, strictly speaking, iterator().next() still compiles on JDK 21, so this is a polishment/modernization change driven by the recipe.

src/test/java/com/bernardomg/security/da.general_idea: Replace iterator().next() with getFirst() to use the new List API introduced in Java 21.
src/test/java/com/bernardomg/security/da.why_exists: While iterator().next() still compiles, the migration recipe targets modernization to Java 21 features; strictly speaking, this is a polishment as the old code is valid, but the intent is to adopt the new API.
